description: Spice up your style with this fashionable yet spacious wallet from wrangler. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of pure leather in crocodile texture with textile lining Embossed brand logo on the front Concealed flap on the front with a removable photo and card holder Two main chambers for keeping cash Green plastic lining on the first cash chamber Convenient chambers for storing cards Concealed chamber below coin and card holder to store other essentials CareWipe dust with a dry, clean cloth
